SPA.name: Secular Progressive Alliance
SPA.short: DMK-led INDIA bloc in Tamil Nadu. DMK contests 164 seats on Rising Sun; INC 27 on Hand. Smaller allies — DMDK, VCK, MDMK, CPI, CPI(M), IUML, KMDK — contest on DMK's Rising Sun symbol per ECI.

NDA.name: National Democratic Alliance
NDA.short: AIADMK-led alliance, rejoined BJP-NDA in April 2025. AIADMK 167 seats on Two Leaves; BJP 27 on Lotus; PMK 18 on Mango; AMMK 11 on Gift Box. TMC(M) 5 on BJP's Lotus; IJK, TMMK, PBK on AIADMK's Two Leaves.

TVK.name: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam
TVK.short: Actor Vijay's new party, contesting solo across all 234 seats in its debut election. Vijay contests from Perambur (AC 12) and Tiruchirappalli East (AC 141).

NTK.name: Naam Tamilar Katchi
NTK.short: Tamil nationalist party contesting all 234 seats solo, with 117 men and 117 women candidates. Seeman contests from Karaikudi (AC 184).

OTH.name: Other Parties
OTH.short: Third-front and smaller state/national parties contesting outside the four headline blocs. Notable presences: Tamizhaga Vaazhvurimai Katchi (Velmurugan, 164 seats), Bahujan Samaj Party (119), AIPMMK (Sasikala, 78), Puthiya Tamilagam (60).

IND.name: Independent Candidates
IND.short: Candidates contesting without party affiliation. 2,208 independents across 234 constituencies — a mean of 9.4 per seat. AC 135 (Karur) has the most with 71, partly attributable to the September 2025 TVK rally crowd crush and surrounding political tension.
